## Summary

Describe what changed.

## Why

Explain why this change is needed.

## Validation

Commands run:

- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Privacy and security

- [ ] This change does not persist raw secrets or private user data.
- [ ] Redaction behavior is preserved or improved.
- [ ] Any external network behavior is explicit and documented.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Documentation updated where needed
- [ ] Public APIs remain vendor-neutral
- [ ] Change is scoped and reviewable

Closes #
